name: DoctoLeb SaaS Tenant Provisioning Process ERD

tables.name: plan_entitlements
tables.comments: Feature defaults included in a SaaS plan.

tables.name: tenant_entitlements
tables.comments: Feature overrides granted to one tenant.

tables.name: provisioning_provider_connections
tables.comments: Stored provider account metadata and secret ref.

tables.name: tenant_provisioning_jobs
tables.comments: Tenant setup job requested by SaaS admin.

tables.name: tenant_provisioning_steps
tables.comments: Reversible step in the setup ledger.

tables.name: tenant_secret_refs
tables.comments: Server-only secret reference for a tenant.

tables.name: tenant_migration_items
tables.comments: One migration item inside a migration run.

tables.name: tenant_events
tables.comments: Safe SaaS event log for tenant lifecycle actions.

notes.content: Read: FK > owner. Areas group schemas. Lines should flow left to right.
admin runs provisioning job; steps create tenant, secrets, migrations, domains, and audit.
